productDisplayName: 24 Men Black Classic Natural Spray EDT Perfume
description: Style noteDeveloped by ScentStory, 24 The Fragrance "Gold" is inspired by Jack Bauer from the TV series 24 (which is the longest running series in TV history and ranked as the 6th greatest television show of all-time!) With this scent you'll be able to embody Jack's extraordinary strength of character and determination through adversity - all without raising a sweat!Product DetailsThe 24 fragnance opens with top notes of lavender, mandarin orange and bergamot, completed by a dash flash of lemon. Heart notes include nutmeg, cinnamon, pink pepper, mint, caraway and anise, settling into a base of amber, musk, oak moss, vanilla and wood.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
